goal_results.evidence: test.sh output: attn.to_out.0 max_diff=0.0151, attn.to_add_out max_diff=0.0166 — both well under 0.1 threshold. SQUARE_OK=2 in diagnostics.
test.sh output: img_mlp.net.0.proj max_diff=0.0172, img_mlp.net.2 max_diff=0.0121, txt_mlp.net.0.proj max_diff=0.0136, txt_mlp.net.2 max_diff=0.0152 — all 4 under 0.1. RECT_OK=4 in diagnostics.

reconstruct_weight.py:24-30 — unpack_svdq_scale implemented with reshape (N//128, K_div_G, 1, 8, 4, 2, 2) and permute (0, 2, 3, 5, 4, 6, 1), correctly reversing the pack_scale layout. All 6 params pass at MED tolerance (<0.05), which requires correct scale unpack.

reconstruct_weight.py:32-66 — unpack_svdq_lowrank implemented handling both down=True (proj_down) and down=False (proj_up) with correct reshape into (c_packs, r_packs, num_n_lanes, num_k_lanes, n_pack_size, k_pack_size, reg_n, reg_k) and inverse permute (0, 1, 4, 2, 6, 5, 3, 7). All 6 params pass, confirming correct lowrank unpack.

reconstruct_weight.py:17-22 — unpack_svdq_qweight uses correct reshape (n_tiles, k_tiles, 1, 8, 8, 4, 2, 2, 1, 8) and fixed permutation (0, 3, 6, 4, 8, 1, 2, 7, 5, 9), matching the oracle's inverse permute. All 6 params reconstruct correctly.

judge_notes: Patch was not pre-applied to /workspace (permissions issue); applied manually. After applying, all 6 parameters reconstruct with max_diff in 0.012-0.017 range, well under the 0.1 task-spec threshold and under the 0.05 medium threshold. test.sh reward = 0.85 (passes all gates except TIGHT <0.005, which is expected due to bf16 rounding — same as oracle per rubric notes). All 5 goals met: both core goals (square + rectangular reconstruction) and all 3 secondary goals (scale unpack, lowrank unpack, qweight unpack fix). Score = 0.36 + 0.36 + 0.10 + 0.10 + 0.08 = 1.00.
